linkedin.text:
69% of Google searches now end without a click.

48% of queries trigger AI Overviews.

ChatGPT has 900M weekly active users.

And only 20% of B2B marketers have started optimizing for AI search.

I compiled 60+ statistics on Answer Engine Optimization for B2B SaaS — covering AI search adoption, zero-click trends, LLM citation patterns, and what it all means for your GTM.

The data is clear: the window to establish AI search visibility is open right now. In 12 months it'll be as competitive as traditional SEO was in 2015.

Full stats page (bookmark this):
linkedin.title: AEO Statistics for B2B SaaS (2026)

thread:
69% of Google searches now end without a click.
48% of queries trigger AI Overviews.
ChatGPT: 900M weekly active users.

Only 20% of B2B marketers have started optimizing for AI search.

I compiled 60+ AEO stats for B2B SaaS 🧵

Key finding: human-written content is cited 8x more often than AI-generated content by LLMs.

But only if it's structured for citation — clear headers, definitive statements, entity-rich prose.

Your content isn't invisible because it's bad. It's invisible because it's not formatted for machines.

The investment gap is massive:

94% of marketers plan to increase AEO investment.
Only 20% have actually started.

That's a 12-month window before this gets as competitive as traditional SEO.

Full 60+ stat breakdown: https://strategnik.com/thinking/aeo-statistics-b2b-saas-2026/
